interface.name: PS_C_AuthorityLetterGenerator
interface.definition:
a!localVariables( local!event: ri!event, local!inmates: property( #"_a-0000ee09-79c9-8000-9bf0-011c48011c48_1488663"(eventId: ri!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/8eedcd4f-41f4-4085-889b-efedecf448e2"]), "inmates", null ), local!prison: #"_a-0000ee09-79c9-8000-9bf0-011c48011c48_1488362"( id: local!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/e1088bb7-c94e-425c-8e45-84e65157b5eb"] ), local!station: #"_a-0000ee09-79c9-8000-9bf0-011c48011c48_1488375"( id: local!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/560658f6-6063-49cc-bca5-d2960a038634"] ), local!place: #"_a-0000ee09-79c9-8000-9bf0-011c48011c48_1488638"( id: local!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/01cd3a97-9761-4cf3-82a6-ff4be94235d3"] ), local!dataSet: a!refreshVariable( value: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1546618"(), refreshAlways: true ), local!verified: false, local!eventType: #"_a-0000ee09-79c9-8000-9bf0-011c48011c48_1488387"(id: ri!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/096e0c76-b28e-4985-a673-0232d1bbc9e3"]), local!eventOpinions: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1488848"( eventId: ri!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/8eedcd4f-41f4-4085-889b-efedecf448e2"] ).data, local!partInma: #"_a-0000ee09-79c9-8000-9bf0-011c48011c48_1488663"(eventId: ri!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/8eedcd4f-41f4-4085-889b-efedecf448e2"]), local!textReport: concat( "

Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren,

", "

der anliegende Verwaltungsvorgang wird mit der Bitte übersandt, den daraus ersichtlichen Sachverhalt in strafrechtlicher Hinsicht zu prüfen. Strafantrag wird für alle in Betracht kommenden Delikte gestellt.

", "

Der Gefangene [Platzhalter Vorname und Name Insasse] kommt aufgrund eines ", local!eventType[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:d5a7da26-3c12-415b-9167-ee3cdac1eba7/29cd76cb-80e7-44d1-962a-2ea20474655e"]," am ", #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1647607"(dateTime: ri!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/98c7949e-598f-4d8a-b5b7-c0beacd1cef5"], month: true()), " gegen ", #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1647607"(dateTime: ri!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/98c7949e-598f-4d8a-b5b7-c0beacd1cef5"], hour: true())," Uhr zur Anzeige. Weitere Details über den Sachverhalt entnehmen Sie unten:

", "

",local!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/4690edf7-5623-48c2-ae87-0e89e052fd8f"], "

", "

", if( a!isNotNullOrEmpty(index(local!partInma, "participants", null)), concat( "

Allen als Zeugen in Betrachtung kommenden Bediensteten der ", local!prison[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:c035ef79-0201-4600-a2b7-9075b42e1d87/83d6cf30-3b09-4a38-89c5-2de99cf67942"] , " (ins besonderen sehen Sie unten) wird durch die Anstaltsleitung hiermit eine Aussagegenehmigung erteilt.

", #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_forEach"( items: index(local!partInma, "participants", null), expression: concat("- ", #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1535179"(userName: fv!item[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:3854eb39-6a61-48cd-82b6-e4645b2900fe/02011db0-86ad-4cf2-bf76-8358c5fd0dc2"]), if(fv!isLast,"

","
")), ), ), "" ), "

Um Mitteilung des Ermittlungsaktenzeichens und des Ausgangs des Verfahrens zu Händen der oben angeführten Person wird gebeten: Sollte es zu einer Anklageerhebung kommen, wird um Übersendung der Anklageschrift gebeten.

", "

Freundliche Grüße

", #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1535179"(userName: loggedInUser()), "

", ), local!mode: "EDIT", local!logo: local!dataSet.logo, local!from: local!prison[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:c035ef79-0201-4600-a2b7-9075b42e1d87/83d6cf30-3b09-4a38-89c5-2de99cf67942"], local!to, local!yourIdentifier: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1546843"(user: loggedInUser()), local!ourIdentifier: local!prison[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:c035ef79-0201-4600-a2b7-9075b42e1d87/83d6cf30-3b09-4a38-89c5-2de99cf67942"], local!phoneAndName: local!dataSet.phoneAndName, local!date: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1647607"(dateTime: local!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/98c7949e-598f-4d8a-b5b7-c0beacd1cef5"], month: true), local!subject: local!eventType[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:d5a7da26-3c12-415b-9167-ee3cdac1eba7/29cd76cb-80e7-44d1-962a-2ea20474655e"], local!body: a!refreshVariable( value: concat( local!textReport, "", "", "", "", "", "", "", #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_forEach"( items: local!eventOpinions, expression: concat( "", "", "", "", "" ) ), "", "", "", "", #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_forEach"( items: property(local!partInma,"participants",null), expression: concat( "", "", "", "", "" ) ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_forEach"( items: property(local!partInma,"inmates",null), expression: concat( "", "", "", "", "" ) ), "
Zeugenaussagen / GutachtenBeschreibung
", "", fv!index, "", "",#"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1535179"(fv!item[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:d20e13d7-6450-4ab5-8eb8-31b00904e791/80d59003-45f5-4439-ba3b-56108d2077a6"]),"",fv!item[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:d20e13d7-6450-4ab5-8eb8-31b00904e791/da2c05ff-925e-4e4e-91e1-775827dd348a"],"
Beteiligte Personen
", #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1535179"(userName: fv!item[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:3854eb39-6a61-48cd-82b6-e4645b2900fe/02011db0-86ad-4cf2-bf76-8358c5fd0dc2"]), "", fv!item[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:3854eb39-6a61-48cd-82b6-e4645b2900fe/5bd820c3-9636-46f6-a807-71831615e1ae"], "", #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:4d45002c-836c-4e02-95f4-03631802dbb1", "
[Platzhalter Vorname und Name Insasse]", fv!item[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/57926ae8-7f08-4777-bd8e-a3fdc76db037"], "", #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:a5b5b659-bf28-444c-8e96-50fd2e142e09", "
", ), refreshAlways: true ), local!houseAddress: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1645216"(prisonId: local!prison[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:c035ef79-0201-4600-a2b7-9075b42e1d87/18523cc9-885d-4706-a91b-efc4cc8eda99"]), local!mailAddress: local!prison[#"urn:appian:record-relationship:v1:c035ef79-0201-4600-a2b7-9075b42e1d87/5654b2b9-b37e-4f0e-a56a-4456a595da87"], local!phone: "+49123456789", local!fax: "+491234567890", local!contact: "+49123456789", local!email: user(loggedInUser(),"email"), local!internet: "www.jva-hamburg.de", local!caseManager: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1535179"(userName: loggedInUser()), local!finalHtml, local!pdfDocument, { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sectionLayout_v1"( label: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:49193d97-489d-4fe0-a10f-ae77a9953509"(#"urn:appian:translation-variable:v1:c53413fa-2572-4c1b-bfc9-98c3ec45f098": ri!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/7bd3ce80-0696-4abd-a32c-6f6f775a9f5d"]), contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_dropdownField_v1"( choiceLabels: {"Strafanzeige"}, choiceValues: {"Strafanzeige"}, label: "Staatsanwaltschaft Berlin"}, choiceValues: {"Staatsanwaltschaft Hamburg", "Staatsanwaltschaft Bremen", "Staatsanwaltschaft Berlin"}, label: ri!emailReceivers, saveInto: ri!emailReceivers, searchDisplay: "AUTO", validations: {} ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_textField"( label: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:d569c07c-52ef-4ad0-830d-35d2b469b542", labelPosition: "ABOVE", value: ri!fileNumberReceiver, saveInto: ri!fileNumberReceiver, refreshAfter: "UNFOCUS", validations: {} ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_multipleDropdownField_v1"( choiceLabels: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_forEach"( items: local!inmates, expression: concat(fv!item[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/7daa88ab-46be-4aa0-8fd9-53cf52511478"], " ", fv!item[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/897606a4-d50b-4a42-bcd0-e4d68bbb2856"]) ), choiceValues: local!inmates, label: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:3c2f1b79-f08c-47dd-a565-3fe566a9f5be", labelPosition: "ABOVE", value: ri!inmates, saveInto: ri!inmates, searchDisplay: "AUTO", validations: {}, required: true ) }, height: "AUTO", style: "TRANSPARENT", marginBelow: "STANDARD" ) }, } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1676583"( eventId: ri!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/8eedcd4f-41f4-4085-889b-efedecf448e2"], selectedDamage: ri!selectedDamage, showWhen: true() ), #"_a-0000ee50-153e-8000-88de-179188179188_19953"( eventID: ri!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/8eedcd4f-41f4-4085-889b-efedecf448e2"], showWhen: true, selectedAttachment: ri!selectedAttachment ) } ) } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_horizontalLine"(), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_checkboxField_v1"( label: "Verify PDF", choiceLabels: {"PDF is correct"}, choiceValues: {true}, value: if(local!verified, true, null), saveInto: { a!save( local!verified, if(isnull(save!value), false, true) ), a!save(local!mode,"PDF"), a!save( target: local!finalHtml, value: joinarray( { "
", "

Diensträume

", "

Drehbahn 36, 20354 Hamburg

", "

Erreichbar mit öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln

", "
", /* Creating this element a second time removes it from all, but the first page */ "
", "

", "

", "

Anrufe bitte möglichst

", "

Mo.-Do. 08:00 – 16:30 Uhr, Fr. 08:00 – 15:00 Uhr

", "

De-Mail

", "

Poststelle@bva-bund.de-mail.de

", "

", "

", "

Konto

", "

Deutsche Bundesbank Filiale Regensburg

", "

IBAN: DE08 7500 0000 0075 0010 07

", "

BIC: MARKDEF1750

", "

", local!from, "
", /* TO */ "
", ri!emailReceivers, "
", /* ADDRESS */ concat( "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "
ANSTALT", local!prison[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:c035ef79-0201-4600-a2b7-9075b42e1d87/83d6cf30-3b09-4a38-89c5-2de99cf67942"], "

", "

", "Aktenzeichen (bei Antworten bitte angeben)", "
", "
", "
Hamburg, den", local!date, "
" ), /* TOP-CENTER BOX */ concat( "
", "Vfg.", "
", "
", "

", "

RD Hagemann

", "

", /* BODY */ "
", local!body, "
" }, char(10) ) ) }, required: true, requiredMessage: "You must check this box!" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_ButtonArrayLayout"( showWhen: false, buttons: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_buttonWidget_v1"( label: "Generate PDF", icon: "file-pdf", value: "PDF", saveInto: { local!mode, a!save( target: local!finalHtml, value: joinarray( { "

" }, char(10) ) ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_startProcess3"( /* Leave this, the new version in 24.4 behaves a bit different and does not show the generated PDF */ processModel: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1687387", processParameters: { htmlBody: local!finalHtml, inmates: local!inmates, additionalStyle: joinarray( { /*"div {border: 2px dotted gray}",*/ "#to p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", "#logo {position: absolute; top: 0mm; left: 0mm; height: 20mm}", "#topCenterBox {position: absolute; top: 0mm; left: 65mm; width: 70mm}", "#topCenterBox p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", "#from {position: absolute; top: 30mm; font-size: 8pt; width: 100%}", "#to {position: absolute; top: 40mm}", "#authority {position: absolute; top: 40mm; right: 0mm; font-size: 8pt}", "#identifiers {position: absolute; top: 80mm; width: 100%}", "#identifiers p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", ".identifierHeader {font-size: 8pt}", "#subject {position: absolute; top: 95mm; font-weight: bold; width: 100%}", "#body {font-size: 12pt; margin-top: 105mm; width: 100%}", "#attachments {margin-top: 10mm; width: 100%}", ".lFooter {position: running(leftFooter); font-size: 6pt;}", ".lFooter p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", ".cFooter {position: running(centerFooter); font-size: 6pt;}", ".cFooter p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", ".rFooter {position: running(rightFooter); font-size: 6pt;}", ".rFooter p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", "#fundingTable {border: 1px solid black; border-collapse: collapse;}", "#fundingTable th {border: 1px solid black; border-collapse: collapse;}", "#fundingTable td {border: 1px solid black; border-collapse: collapse; padding: 1mm}", "h1 {font-size: 14pt}", "h2 {font-size: 12pt}", }, char(10) ) }, onSuccess: { a!save( target: local!pdfDocument, value: fv!processInfo.pv.generatedPdfs ), a!save( target: ri!pdfDoc, value: fv!processInfo.pv.generatedPdfs ) } ) }, style: "OUTLINE", loadingIndicator: true, showWhen: local!mode = "EDIT" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_buttonWidget_v1"( label: "Bearbeiten", icon: "pen", value: "EDIT", saveInto: local!mode, width: "FILL", style: "OUTLINE", showWhen: local!mode = "PDF" ) }, align: "CENTER", marginBelow: "NONE" ) }, divider: "BELOW" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sectionLayout_v1"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"(), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_imageField_v1"( labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", images: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: local!logo ), align: "START" ) } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: {} ) } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_styledTextEditorField"( label: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:3f0fea51-464c-4d6e-94e2-372a9e9bb63d", labelPosition: "ABOVE", placeholder: "Max Mustermann – Musterstraße 1 – 12345 Musterstadt", value: local!from, saveInto: local!from, sizeLimit: 4000, height: "MEDIUM", readOnly: true ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_styledTextEditorField"( label: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:ddad0132-03a8-4678-b387-1da05b45bad0", labelPosition: "ABOVE", placeholder: "Muster GmbH Frau/Herr ... Abteilungsleitung Musterstraße 2 – 4 12345 Musterstadt", value: ri!emailReceivers, saveInto: local!to, sizeLimit: 4000, height: "MEDIUM", readOnly: true ) } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: upper(#"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:21f519fb-6dba-47e7-915c-9d4292d4f40b"), labelPosition: "ADJACENT", value: local!prison[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:c035ef79-0201-4600-a2b7-9075b42e1d87/83d6cf30-3b09-4a38-89c5-2de99cf67942"] ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: upper(#"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:a0ce6a10-abbd-4582-8148-f54cac206dd4"), labelPosition: "ADJACENT", value: local!houseAddress ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: upper(#"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:08759f88-ac66-4e98-8ad0-4134b95b2318"), labelPosition: "ADJACENT", value: concat(user(loggedInUser(), "firstName"), " ", user(loggedInUser(), "lastName")), ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: "TEL", labelPosition: "ADJACENT", value: local!phone ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: "FAX", labelPosition: "ADJACENT", value: local!fax ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: "KONTAKT", labelPosition: "ADJACENT", value: local!contact ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: "E-MAIL", labelPosition: "ADJACENT", value: local!email ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: "", labelPosition: "ADJACENT", value: "" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label:
